stemHtml: An aircraft is on the approach to land. At what point during the approach would the pilot report FINAL?

options.a: When established on the extended centreline of the runway.
options.b: At a distance of 5 NM or greater from touchdown.
options.c: At a distance of 4 NM or less from the landing runway.
options.d: As soon as visual contact with the aerodrome is established.
